docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCES, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-08-2019 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FARHOD MASUMOV. DEFENDANT ADAM ISAAK DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MELIFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
ORDER RE:CONTINUED TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPY SC-100 CLAIM MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/03.18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,080.00 FILED BY MASUMOV, FARHOD AS TO DEFENDANT ISAAK, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASUMOV, FARHOD AS TO DEFENDANT ISAAK, ADAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-22-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ISAAK, ADAM
